channel.title: LOG-DEBUG mode
channel.description:
# Description Activate LOG mode where internal actions logs can be activated or deactivated
The idea is that every action can be easily tracked via logs in a way that can be activated/deactivated in Development mode. This logging will be deactivated by default in production
This can be a great tool for learning and debugging purposes
# Examples Using something like https://www.npmjs.com/package/debug
# More info https://strongloop.com/strongblog/compare-node-js-logging-winston-bunyan/ https://blog.bitsrc.io/logging-best-practices-for-node-js-applications-8a0a5969b94c https://github.com/winstonjs/winston https://github.com/winstonjs/winston

item.title: LOG-DEBUG mode
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
Is this different than the DevTools FD?

Read full topic

item.title: LOG-DEBUG mode
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
I’m not sure what’s the best way of handling these log messages, if via terminal or via DevTools
Maybe via terminal is a good enough first step.

But by reading the DevTools FD I realized that we should wait for the hooks feature. Once the hooks feature is available, I think we should be able to implement a log for every process that can be hooked.

I think this is the way to go: implement a hook for every action/process that we’d like to log so it’s also available for some other logic implementation.

Read full topic

item.title: LOG-DEBUG mode
item.dc:creator: SantosGuillamot
item.description:
Thanks for suggesting this Juanma Would this be part of the DevTools we are planning to work on in the future or is it something different?

Read full topic

item.title: LOG-DEBUG mode
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Description

Activate LOG mode where internal actions logs can be activated or deactivated

The idea is that every action can be easily tracked via logs in a way that can be activated/deactivated in Development mode.
This logging will be deactivated by default in production

This can be a great tool for learning and debugging purposes

Examples

Using something like https://www.npmjs.com/package/debug

More info

strongloop.com

StrongLoop - Comparing Winston and Bunyan Node.js Logging


https://blog.bitsrc.io/logging-best-practices-for-node-js-applications-8a0a5969b94c
github.com

winstonjs/winston

A logger for just about everything. Contribute to winstonjs/winston development by creating an account on GitHub.


github.com

winstonjs/winston

A logger for just about everything. Contribute to winstonjs/winston development by creating an account on GitHub.

Read full topic
